debug_info.goal: ⊢ failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)

proof:
let AH : Option PUnit → Option PUnit → Type _ := fun a b =>
    match a, b with
    | none, _ => PUnit
    | some _, some _ => PUnit
    | some _, none => PEmpty
  let AC : ∀ {X Y Z}, AH X Y → AH Y Z → AH X Z := fun {X Y Z} =>
    match X, Y, Z with
    | none, _, _ => fun _ _ => PUnit.unit
    | some _, some _, some _ => fun _ _ => PUnit.unit
    | some _, some _, none => fun _ g => PEmpty.elim g
    | some _, none, _ => fun f _ => PEmpty.elim f
  have AHS : ∀ a b, Subsingleton (AH a b) := by
    intro a b; cases a <;> cases b <;> simp_all [AH] <;> infer_instance
  let C : Category (Option PUnit) := {
    Hom := AH
    id := fun a => match a with | none => PUnit.unit | some _ => PUnit.unit
    comp := AC
    id_comp := fun {X Y} _ => (AHS X Y).elim _ _
    comp_id := fun {X Y} _ => (AHS X Y).elim _ _
    assoc := fun {W _ _ Z} _ _ _ => (AHS W Z).elim _ _
  }
  let D : Category PUnit := {
    Hom := fun _ _ => PUnit
    id := fun _ => PUnit.unit
    comp := fun _ _ => PUnit.unit
    id_comp := fun _ => rfl
    comp_id := fun _ => rfl
    assoc := fun _ _ _ => rfl
  }
  exact ⟨Option PUnit, PUnit, C, D,
    @Functor.mk _ _ C D
      (fun _ => PUnit.unit) (fun _ => PUnit.unit) (fun _ => rfl) (fun _ _ => rfl),
    none, some PUnit.unit, PUnit.unit,
    fun ⟨g, _, _⟩ => PEmpty.elim g,
    ⟨PUnit.unit, rfl, rfl⟩⟩
